name: monthly-report-app
description: Applicazione Angular + Electron per la compilazione del report mensile ed export Excel.
author: Thomas Rognoni

scripts.kill:electron: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$names = @('monthly-report-app','electron'); foreach ($n in $names) { Get-Process -Name $n -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2"
scripts.clean:electron: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run kill:electron | Out-Null; for ($i=0; $i -lt 12; $i++) { if (-not (Test-Path 'dist_electron')) { exit 0 }; try { attrib -r 'dist_electron\*' /s /d 2>$null; Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'dist_electron' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop; exit 0 } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; throw 'dist_electron is still locked'"
scripts.electron-build: npm run clean:electron && npm run build && electron-builder
